G: x-user-id
H: 401
P: header
V: auth ∧ risk ∧ verify ∧ drop_hdr
A: keep_401 ∧ spoof_denied

Verify: auth and risk and verify and drop the header path.
Answer target: keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.

Answer target: verified session auth only.
